name: HR leave carryover policy example
answer:
Employees may carry over 10 days into the next calendar year.
Employees may carry over 20 days into the next calendar year.
Employees receive a monthly home-office stipend.

sources.title: HR Leave Carryover Policy
sources.content:
Employees may carry over 10 days into the next calendar year.
Employees may request a payout for unused vacation days at year end.
